name: 16-invalid-duplicate-external-ref
description: CycloneDX component has two externalReferences entries with identical (type, url) pairs. Per ADR-0003, duplicates on (type, url) are forbidden — two references with the same type and URL must be merged into one entry at emit time, not disambiguated by comment or other metadata.
notes: The companion sidecar (fixture-16.aibom.json) is a valid minimal AIBOM. The defect is purely in fixture-16.cdx.json. The duplicate-forbidden rule prevents ambiguity in deterministic hashing: if duplicates were permitted, their order within the array would affect canonical bytes.
